source: DCCEEW — Australian National Greenhouse Accounts Factors 2025, Table 1 (location-based electricity). Applies to the 2025–26 reporting year. GWP basis: IPCC AR5 (GWP-100), consistent with NGER.
status: PRIMARY-VERIFIED 2026-06-10. All 22 electricity Scope 2/3 values confirmed cell-by-cell against the official DCCEEW NGA Factors 2025 XLSX (Table 1). Natural gas confirmed against Table 5 ('Natural gas distributed in a pipeline' = 51.53 kg CO2e/GJ combined).

_notes.wa_grids: WA has two grids with different factors: SWIS (Perth/SW, default for 'WA') and NWIS (Pilbara). Use WA_NWIS for Pilbara sites.
_notes.act: ACT shares the NSW grid factor.
_notes.scope2_vs_scope3: Scope 2 = generation/combustion at the power station. Scope 3 = upstream fuel extraction/transport + transmission & distribution losses (~10%). Report separately; do not sum into one line for NGER/ASRS.
_notes.natural_gas: 0.185 kg CO2e/kWh = Scope 1 combustion. NGA Table 5 'Natural gas distributed in a pipeline' = 51.53 kg CO2e/GJ combined (51.4 CO2 + 0.1 CH4 + 0.03 N2O). Convert: 51.53 kg/GJ x 3.6 GJ/MWh = 185.5 kg/MWh = 0.185 kg/kWh. Scope 3 (extraction + distribution) not yet included here — add before quoting full lifecycle gas emissions.
